steps.summary: Commit all staged root-repo changes together.

raw_payload.body: This commit optimizes the handling of viewport safe scroll ownership contracts for shell surfaces by reducing redundant validations and improving efficiency.
raw_payload.rationale: The changes aim to streamline the process of ensuring that shell surfaces meet the viewport safe scroll ownership criteria, which will lead to more efficient resource usage and potentially enhance user experience by reducing unnecessary validations.
raw_payload.subject: Optimize viewport safe scroll ownership logic for shell surfaces

}
